explanation: Given the current positions and attack ranges, only our Warplane (unit 5) can attack the enemy Warplane (enemy unit 5). This is a prime opportunity to deal damage to an enemy unit, especially since the enemy Warplane is a high-mobility unit that can pose a significant threat if left unchecked. For the second action, we should move our Sniper (unit 3) closer to the enemy lines to potentially get into a position to attack in future turns. The Sniper has a long range and can be very effective if positioned well. Moving it towards the enemy while maintaining a safe distance will be beneficial for future engagements.
